reference: Hello. I just wanted to ask you something. Well, I have been on the Mirena for about two years, and I have recently had this bloody, mucousy discharge coming out. I do have intercourse. I have also been dealing with back pain lately, and a while ago I started having really bad heartburn, like I couldn't even breathe because it would hurt.
text: Hello, I just wanted to ask you something. Well, I have been on the marine for about two years, and I have recently had this bloody, useless discharge coming out. I do have to admit, I have also been dealing with that too. But a while ago, I started having really bad heartburn. I just couldn't even breathe because it hurt.
